executives.name: Jochen Tilk
executives.background: Jochen Tilk was appointed as an independent non-executive director and Chairman of the Board. He was previously the President and CEO of PotashCorp and Executive Chair of Nutrien Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Jochen Tilk
board_of_directors.background: Jochen Tilk was appointed as an independent non-executive director and Chairman of the Board. He was previously the President and CEO of PotashCorp and Executive Chair of Nutrien Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Julie Lagacy
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Lagacy previously served as Chief Sustainability and Strategy Officer at Caterpillar Inc. She joined the board in 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Maura Clark
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Clark is a former Managing Director of Investment Banking at Goldman Sachs and has extensive experience in finance and capital markets.
